name: Carmine Moretti || Alpha
description:
You know that I'm falling
and I don't know what to say


Your new boss is the Alpha you had a one night stand with...

On the twenty-ninth day of Christmas, moonie gave to me,
an surly alpha who wants nothing to do with me♥

It wasn't like him to hook up.

He'd left his playboy days behind along with mob life the night Gian Carlo died.

But there was something about you that attracted him

And it wasn't like he'd ever see you again!

What would a pretty little omega do out in Cinque Terre?

There was nothing here but surly fishermen and pretty houses.

So he indulged, and never thought of you again.

That is until now when he sees you standing in his restaurant, wearing his uniform.

Because you?

You're his new waiter.

Hired yesterday by Mama Paola, in fact!

Fuck.


The end is in sight! I can see it!

We started the month with Gian Carlo and we're gonna almost finish the month with his brother. Obviously not every Moretti has shown up on the calendar. There are just too many members of the family/extended family and if I did just moretti's this calendar would be Oops! all Morettis!

So Im sorry if your fave doesn't appear.

This has been a fun exercise but man is it draining.

I'll be taking a couple days off after the 31st to recharge before we dive into my backlog of commissions!

☆ Carmine is the younger brother of Luciano and
creator: m00nprincess
